title: What's the price of uncertainty?
summary:
Main
The three things investors need to know this week
Economic uncertainty is at pandemic levels. As markets try to price in this kind of uncertainty, we are beginning to see significant volatility across assets, bonds outperforming equities and equities rotating into safer harbours. The price of uncertainty is not too high - yet.
